betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High-Performance Solvent Bedrock Processing§f is the highest tier for bedrock ores.

§eExclusive Materials:§f
Only §bHigh-Performance Solvent§f unlocks:
• §bBismuth§f - Rare heavy metal for advanced alloys
• §bTechnetium-99§f - Valuable nuclear byproduct
• Other rare elements unavailable with lower solvents

§eProduction Chain:§f
Vacuum Refinery → Reformate Gas → Industrial Mixer (+ Chlorine) → HP Solvent

§aTip:§f The full HP Solvent chain is essential for late-game material access.
